reviews.comment:
Si quieren tener un buen viaje, no paren en esta estacion de servicio. A las 3 horas de salir de nuestra casa paramos aca para cargar nafta e ir al baño. Como el baño es un trailer (para peor mugriento que parecia que no lo limpiaban hace dias) que esta en el medio de la nada sin reparo de la lluvia al que subis por medio de una escalera de chapa, cuando sali del mismo me resbale por la falta de seguridad de la escalera y me lastime la cadera. El playero no aparecio ni siquiera para ofrecer un vaso de agua y cuando reclamas te dan el numero de un seguro tan basura que te quiere indemnizar por 2 mangos, sin poder cubrir el mal momento que pasaste. SON INPRESENTABLES, NO PAREN EN ESTA ESTACION!!!!

(Translated by Google)
If you want a good trip, don't stop at this gas station. Three hours after leaving our house, we stopped here to fill up and use the restroom. The restroom is a trailer (and to make matters worse, it was filthy and looked like it hadn't been cleaned in days) located in the middle of nowhere, exposed to the rain, and you have to climb in using a metal ladder. When I came out, I slipped because the ladder wasn't very secure and hurt my hip. The attendant didn't even offer a glass of water, and when you complain, they give you the number of a terrible insurance company that only offers a pittance, not enough to cover the ordeal. THEY ARE UNACCEPTABLE, DON'T STOP AT THIS STATION!!!!
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/1103205321495883631/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSURSanJuTnlnRRAB
